text: Reconciliation: this epic's completion claim predated the 2026-07-08 assessment, which found gaps (see gale-epic-remediation). Those gaps are now genuinely closed by the remediation epic: correctness fixes (beta==0 kernels, stride-honoring writes, overflow guards, canonical flags, MM headers), honest APIs (real workspace/BlockJacobi/conditionEstimate, cgnr+real lsqr), privacy boundaries (no public Array[Double], private kernels), kernel-doctrine sweep (thin QR, Givens GMRES, CSC direct kernels, blocked gemm, dnrm2), and missing surface (TriangularSolve, canonicalization, Banded, CSC parity, gale-laws module, CI/Wasm). Evidence: testAll core 143/143 JVM+JS + laws 17/17 JVM+JS.
